parityMeta.describes: TrainingDecision V2 stale-todayStatus parity — todayStatus.date older than DATA_HEALTH_TODAY_STATUS_STALE_DAYS (3) is detected by the runtime guard (cleanInput.diagnostics.staleTodayStatus=true). Neutral status values mean no false recovery/fatigue signal leaks. Locks the stale-status detection contract.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: Synthetic AppData. todayStatus.date is 6 days before the clock (> 3-day stale window) with neutral sleep/energy so the only signal is the staleness flag. Recent sessions keep the phase persisted (no gap).
